full_text:
Lady Hu 胡氏
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lady Hu (胡氏). Beaten by her husband’s troops over fears of an affair with Liu Shan. Lady Hu was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
